title: Where Technology Meets Trust- TC EYE Centre - TC Eye Centre
description: Discover the future of eye care with D.R.E.A.M. OCT™ at TC Eye Centre. Experience ultra-wide, high-definition retinal imaging
text:
Where Technology Meets Trust- TC EYE Centre - TC Eye Centre Services Physicians Gallery Skill Training Peramedical Institute Of Optometry Book Appointment Revolutionising Diabetic Retinopathy Treatment with North India's First And World’s Widest Angle Angio OCT Deep | Rapid | Extensive | Accurate | Multimodal Know More.. Revolutionising Glaucoma Diagnosis Pioneering Work On Glaucoma Done At TC Eye Centre Water Drinking Provocation Test for earliest Detection of Glaucoma. Pioneers of Retinal Ganglion Cell Layer Analysis for Earliest Detection of Glaucoma damage. Stereo Disc Photography for long term documentation of Optic Disc Changes in Glaucoma. Read Article Revolutionising Glaucoma Treatement Endoscopic Cyclo Photocoagulation. Revolutionary Treatment for Unmanageable Glaucomas. Watch  Video Revolutionising Cataract Surgery Stellaris PC Phaco System for unmatched Phaco surgery with just 1.8mm Micro Incision Surgery. Lumera 700 The finest Ophthalmic Microscope Zeiss for unmatched precision in Cataract Surgery. For over 30 years , we’ve been dedicated to providing our patients with the most advanced eye care solutions. Our commitment to innovation and patient-centric care has made us a trusted name in eye health. With the Ultra Wide Angle Angio OCT , we are setting a new standard for early detection and comprehensive diagnosis—ensuring your eyes are in the safest hands. Watch & Learn: Protect Your Vision from Diabetic Eye Diseases Our Landmarks TC Eye Centre is a pioneer in offering a variety of eye surgery procedures, viz. Pioneers in use of PFCL in North India for Giant Tear Surgery of Retina 1992 Added Telemedicine in Ophthalmology by developing High Definition Photography for Eyes. 1993 Introduced for the first time in the World, the concept of Low dose Retinal Angiography 2005 First to introduce 3D HD Angiography for Retinal disorders 2005 Pioneers in Ultrafine 27 Gauge Vitrectomy for Retinal Surgery in India 2013 India's First Cirrus 500 HD OCT 2013 Lumera 700 microscope with Resight 700 Automatic for the world's foremost Retinal Surgery Viewing System. 2016 Endoscopic Cyclo PhotoCoagulation for Minimal Surgery for Glaucoma treatment. 2018 EDOF IOL Surgery for Cataract for High Depth of Focus with reduced dependence on glasses. 2022 Revolutionizing Diabetic Retinopathy Diagnosis and Care Proudly introduced North India’s First and the World’s Widest Angle Angio OCT – Setting a new global benchmark in precision, early detection, and comprehensive retinal imaging. With this breakthrough, TC Eye Centre has emerged as one of the few centres in the world for Retinal Imaging . 2025 MEET OUR PHYSICIANS Get to know our physicians. Meet the experts who are dedicated to providing the best medical care for you. Dr. Alpana Lele MBBS, MS Senior Consultant TC Eye centre Experience of over 35 years Dr. Upsham Goel MBBS, MS Retina, Comprehensive Ophthalmology 35 Years Experience Overall Dr. Prabhav Puri MBBS, MD(AIIMS) Retina, UUEA, ROP, CATARACT
Experience 8 Years Dr Vishal Jaiswal MBBS, MS, DNB Phaco- Refractive, Glaucoma
Experience- 18 Years Visiting Consultants Dr. Amit Agarwal M.S. Cornea and  Anterior Segment Dr. Samreen Mehfooz MBBS, MS Uveitis, Comprehensive Ophthalmology Dr. Anjali Gupta MBBS ,MS ,FIOPS (Fellowship in Oculoplasty) Oculoplasty and Ocular Oncology with 7 years experience Gallery What patients say about us? Gulshan      The center has very experienced Doctor and is well equipped with best diagnostic equipments. I had come to show my mother for some retina problem. We had little hope that we would be able to save her vision in one eye. But thanks to Dr Upsham Goel. By his expertise and treatment that he suggested , her vision has been saved and both eyes have pretty good vision. Nitin Joshi      Very professional run clinic using the latest technology equipment , most helpful and friendly staff. Dr Goel Sir very patiently explained to us about the progress of the developing cataract and guided us on the next course of action. He very patiently answered all our queries. A very pleasant interaction . We highly recommend Dr Upsham Goel’s care for all eye related issues . Tx Dr Goel. Ved Chandra      A very friendly environment with utmost professional approach. Dr.Goyal himself is a very learned and down to earth grassroot level person. He believes in 'Prevention is better than cure'. Educates and makes the patient understand the issue in a very lucid manner. May God Bless you Dr. Goyal. Book an Appointment today Your vision is our top priority at TC Eye Care.
